achieved_wave1_verification_fraction.rationale: Gate variable cannot overshoot the 85% Wave 1 verification target by design; bernoulli_gate models execution risk. Low reflects partial-handover floor on miss. Pass probability 0.5 reflects unprecedented planetary severance scope with no comparable precedent.

total_relocation_headcount.rationale: No headcount disclosed in the plan; estimation method calls for registry audit between 3 deg S and 3 deg N plus designated personnel globally. Wide range reflects high uncertainty over which populations qualify as designated relocatees.

total_24mo_severance_and_stabilization_c.rationale: Base modestly exceeds $12T allocation given replacement-labor, modular-housing, severance contracts, and IOB opex at planetary scale. High-side spread covers cost overruns drawing on the $18T residual envelope; low covers underspend scenario.

achieved_machine_energy_contribution_fra.rationale: Gate variable cannot overshoot the 10% mandated contribution by design; bernoulli_gate models compliance pass/fail. Low reflects partial-metering shortfall floor. Pass probability 0.6 reflects machine-domain southern viability dependency flagged as an unmodelled gate.

achieved_northern_hub_density_per_km2.rationale: Base centered just under 13k/km^2 planning cap; high-side spread to 18k reflects influx-vs-housing-deployment risk that breaches humane mandate. Low reflects successful modular housing acceleration across the five largest hubs.
